meaning: v.口述,口授,使听写,指令,指示,命令,规定n.指示(指理智,变心)
examples: The choice that does this is "dictate".
What right do they have to dictate how we live our lives?
What gives them the right to dictate to us what we should eat?
This list gives newlyweds insight into many of the key factors that will dictate their decision.
If Europe is to become a centralized state, it will do so by evolution, not dictate.
